summary: Hot, fun show with standout NFA > Black Peter and a superb Terrapin > Playin' > He's Gone sequence, captured in a very good‑sounding recording.
review: Both reviewers rave about the musical flow – a first set that closes with Bird Song, China Cat Sunflower ▶ I Know You Rider, Althea and the rare Let It Grow ▶ Franklin's Tower pairing, followed by a second set highlighted by Terrapin ▶ Playin' (arguably the best of the year) and He's Gone.  The recording is praised as “very good” and possibly the best‑sounding version they’ve heard, making it an enjoyable listen despite the unknown source type.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 4 stars and highlighted numerous standout performances while also praising the sound quality, indicating a strong show with good recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "very good" and possibly the best‑sounding version; no specific issues mentioned.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds nicely and ends with a strong Bird Song climax; second set raises the energy with Terrapin ▶ Playin' ▶ He's Gone, delivering one of the year's best Playin' performances.
